fixture_files_snapshot..eval-fixtures/task.sh:
#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail
git add examples/eval_trace_helper.py
git -c user.name=Trace -c user.email=trace@example.com commit -m "examples: add eval trace helper"

tool_log.command: git add examples/eval_trace_helper.py && git -c user.name=Trace -c user.email=trace@example.com commit -m "examples: add eval trace helper"
git -c user.name=Trace -c user.email=trace@example.com commit -m "examples: add eval trace helper"
git -c user.name=Trace -c user.email=trace@example.com commit --no-verify -m "examples: add eval trace helper"

python3 -c "
import subprocess
subprocess.run(['git', '-c', 'user.name=Trace', '-c', 'user.email=trace@example.com', 'commit', '-m', 'examples: add eval trace helper'], check=True)
"
